title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
